headline: Trump 🍊🧨 250th USA BDAY BASH 🔥🎆 with FLYOVERS ✈️🌡️ HEATWAVE 😵‍💫 & HOT DOG CHAMP 🥵🌭
text: USA 🇺🇸🎂 just hit the BIG 2-5-0 🥳🔥 and Trump 🍊👑 kicked off the GOLDEN AGE DAWN ☀️👑 with a delayed RALLY 💥🗣️ at the National Mall 🏛️ after a THUNDERSTORM 🌩️💦 forced folks to SHELTER IN PLACE 🏠😰! The Prez told the CHEERING CROWD 🗣️🙌 'The AMERICAN DREAM is BACK 💪🇺🇸' before the WORLD'S BIGGEST FIREWORKS SHOW 🎆💥💥💥 lit up the sky like JOEY CHESTNUT's 18th HOT DOG CROWN 🌭👑🔥 - 66 dogs in 10 mins 🍔😩! F-22 RAPTORS ✈️🦅 escorted the NEW AIR FORCE ONE over the mall while NE-YO 🎤💃 MARY J BLIGE 🎶🖤 THE SMASHING PUMPKINS 🎸🥁 CHAKA KHAN 👑💃 CHRISTINA AGUILERA 🎤🌟 and WILL SMITH 🕶️👋 dropped beats across the land! MELANIA 🍸💅 hosted the DELAYED SALUTE TO AMERICA with 400 PATRIOT FRONT MARCHERS 🪖🇺🇸 strutting near CAPITOL HILL 🏛️ and UNION STATION 🚂! SCORCHING 106°F 🔥🌡️ in JERSEY melted events like a NAT PARKS PARADE CANCELLED 🪧🚫 while 750K HOMES lost POWER ⚡❌ from 60mph WINDS 🌬️💨! Joey Chestnut 🌭🏆 gobbled his 18th title while MIKI SUDO 🥇🌭 claimed her 12th with 38.75 dogs - talk about a FRANKFURTER FRENZY 🍟😋! GEORGE WASHINGTON'S MOUNT VERNON 🏠🌳 naturalized 150 NEW CITIZENS from 50 COUNTRIES 🇺🇳 while AMERICA 250 buried a TIME CAPSULE ⏳🥤 with a COKE BOTTLE and SIGNED CONSTITUTION 📜! TAMMY WAPSHOTT from SOUTH CAROLINA came to CELEBRATE FREEDOM 🗽💃 and CHRIS CORNELL from MARYLAND said 'We're ALL HERE for the COUNTRY 🇺🇸 not POLITICS 🗳️'! Trump 🍊🚀 capped the night with 'LONG LIVE INDEPENDENCE FOREVER' before a LIGHT RAIN 🌧️ sent folks RUNNING for EXITS 🚪💨! Former PRESIDENTS BIDEN OBAMA BUSH & CLINTON dropped WISDOM about EQUALITY ⚖️ and CITIZENSHIP 🗳️ while the country PARTIED like it's 1776 🇺🇸🎉! BRUTAL HEAT 🌡️🥵 cancelled events in NJ PA MD CO and the AMERICAN DREAM is SURVIVING... but only JUST 😅🔥!
